author: Richard Dewick - makakman
body: Hey Matt, great choices above, I’ve got my iTunes firmly locked on Motown today, cheers.

author: Alan
body:
Matt — agree nice choices! You can’t go wrong with Marvin and Stevie. If you had to add a few more..I’d go with the Jackson 5, Diana Ross & the Supremes, and the Temptations and then you’d have it all covered from my perspective. Thanks for posting this and the reminder of the big 50 for Motown.

Alan  
The Motown Greats  
[http://www.MotownGreats.com](http://www.MotownGreats.com/)
